title: Repeated patterns in regular expressions should not match the empty string
description: Avoid using the same pattern multiple times in a regular expression, especially when it matches the empty string. This can lead to unexpected behavior and performance issues.
message: Repeated pattern in regular expression matches the empty string.
recommendation: Refactor the regular expression to avoid repeating the same pattern.

noncompliant.code:
import re
regex = re.compile(r'(a|b)+')
matches = re.findall(regex, '')
noncompliant.description: Repeated pattern in regular expression matches the empty string.

compliant.code:
import re
regex = re.compile(r'(a|b|c)+')
matches = re.findall(regex, '')
compliant.description: Use a different pattern to avoid repeating the same pattern.

why_is_this_an_issue: Repeated patterns can lead to performance issues and unexpected behavior when they match the empty string.
how_to_fix: Refactor the regular expression to avoid repeating the same pattern.

logic.message: Repeated pattern in regular expression matches the empty string.

metadata.title: Repeated patterns in regular expressions should not match the empty string
